description: Complete ADR-2603282000 — P1/P2/P3/P5/P8-partial already implemented. This spec covers the remaining pieces: P4 (Dockerfile + sandbox YAML), P6 (hook worktree gate), P7 (hex swarm microVM-first default).

specs.given: hex-agent/Dockerfile exists with a multi-stage build (rust builder + debian:bookworm-slim runtime)
specs.when: docker build -t hex-agent:latest hex-agent/ is run
specs.then: Image builds; hex-agent binary is at /usr/local/bin/hex-agent; WORKSPACE defaults to /workspace; image is under 200MB

specs.description: sandbox.yml defines the correct network policy
specs.then: Allows host:3033 (SpacetimeDB), host:5555 (nexus), host:11434 (Ollama), openrouter.ai:443, crates.io:443, static.crates.io:443, npmjs.com:443; all other outbound is default-deny

specs.description: hex hook subagent-start gates non-Docker path: HEXFLO_TASK set + cwd is project root → error
specs.given: HEXFLO_TASK env var is set AND cwd contains a root-level Cargo.toml with [workspace]

specs.description: hex hook subagent-start passes when cwd is a worktree
specs.given: HEXFLO_TASK is set AND cwd path contains 'hex-worktrees' or 'feat/'
specs.then: Exit code 0 — worktree detected, gate not triggered

specs.description: hex hook subagent-start is a no-op without HEXFLO_TASK
specs.then: Exit code 0, no output — gate only enforces swarm tasks

specs.description: hex swarm spawn uses docker run when Docker is available
specs.given: Docker daemon running and hex-agent:latest image exists
specs.when: hex swarm spawn or hex nexus POST /api/agents/spawn is called with a worktree_branch
specs.then: docker run is invoked with WORKSPACE, HEX_NEXUS_URL, HEX_AGENT_ID, HEXFLO_TASK, SPACETIMEDB_TOKEN injected; worktree path bind-mounted to /workspace

specs.description: hex swarm spawn falls back to process when Docker is unavailable
specs.given: docker is not in PATH or daemon is down
specs.then: Falls back to process spawn (existing SpawnConfig path); logs 'docker_unavailable: falling back to process spawn'

specs.description: hex_write_file rejects path traversal (existing P2 — verified by test)
specs.given: MCP server receives hex_write_file with path='../../etc/passwd'

specs.description: hex_write_file rejects cross-adapter boundary violation (existing P2 — verified by test)
specs.given: Content written to adapters/primary/ contains 'use crate::adapters::secondary'
